    P

    Coordinates visibility and management of all UI panels in the game.

    pauseGame() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.MultiplayerCallbacks
    Toggles the pause state of the multiplayer game.
    pauseGame() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks
    Toggles the pause state of the game.
    pauseGame() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameStateManager
    Pauses or resumes the game.

    Pauses the multiplayer timer.

    Plays the button click sound.

    Plays the game music (looping).

    Plays the game over sound.

    Plays the garbage sound.

    Plays the hover sound.

    Plays the line clear sound effect.
    playLineClear() - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.input.InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks
    Plays the line clear sound effect.

    Plays the line clear sound.
    playMainMenuMusic() - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.AudioManager
    Plays the main menu music (looping).

    Plays the winner sound.
    pollGarbageLine() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.GarbageQueue
    Removes and returns the next garbage line from the queue.
    processGarbageQueue() - Method in class com.comp2042.model.SimpleBoard
    Processes pending garbage from the queue and adds it to the bottom of the board.
    processGarbageQueue(int) - Method in interface com.comp2042.controller.manager.GameLoopManager.GarbageProcessingCallbacks
     
    processGarbageQueue(int) - Method in class com.comp2042.controller.manager.GarbageManager
    Processes garbage queue for a player, adding pending garbage lines to the board.
